hooks.command:
python -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
fp = data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or data.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath','')
if fp.endswith('.py'):
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'[Doc Update Reminder] .py file modified. Check and update: CLAUDE.md, memory/, TODO.md'}}))
"
